import io
import string
import list

fn main() -> Unit
  let line = match io.read_line()
  when Some(s)
    s
  when None
    ""
  end

  mut nums: List<Int> = []
  mut cur = ""
  let n = string.len(line)
  mut i = 0
  while i < n
    let b = match string.byte_at(line, i)
    when Some(v)
      v
    when None
      0
    end
    if b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13
      if string.len(cur) > 0
        let v = match string.parse_int(cur)
        when Some(x)
          x
        when None
          0
        end
        nums = list.push(nums, v)
        cur = ""
      end
    else
      cur = "#{cur}#{string.from_byte(b)}"
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  if string.len(cur) > 0
    let v = match string.parse_int(cur)
    when Some(x)
      x
    when None
      0
    end
    nums = list.push(nums, v)
  end

  let count = nums.len()
  mut sorted: List<Int> = []
  mut k = 0
  while k < count
    let x = match nums.get(k)
    when Some(v)
      v
    when None
      0
    end
    mut new_sorted: List<Int> = []
    mut inserted = false
    mut j = 0
    let slen = sorted.len()
    while j < slen
      let y = match sorted.get(j)
      when Some(v)
        v
      when None
        0
      end
      if not inserted and x <= y
        new_sorted = list.push(new_sorted, x)
        inserted = true
      end
      new_sorted = list.push(new_sorted, y)
      j = j + 1
    end
    if not inserted
      new_sorted = list.push(new_sorted, x)
    end
    sorted = new_sorted
    k = k + 1
  end

  mut out = ""
  mut m = 0
  let slen2 = sorted.len()
  while m < slen2
    let v = match sorted.get(m)
    when Some(x)
      x
    when None
      0
    end
    if m == 0
      out = "#{v}"
    else
      out = "#{out} #{v}"
    end
    m = m + 1
  end
  println(out)
end
